meta.source: Official Spanish university sites + TodoFP (Ministerio de Educación, FP). Figures/requirements are general; verify nota de corte / tuition per year.

institutions.name: Formación Profesional (sistema educativo español)
institutions.applicationVia: Admisión a FP (consejería de educación autonómica)

programmes.tuitionFee: Public — regional fees (approx., set per comunidad)
programmes.entryRequirements: Bachillerato (Ciencias) + EvAU/PAU; one of the highest nota de corte of any degree
programmes.careerOutcome: Graduates sit the MIR exam to enter medical residency (residencia / especialidad)

programmes.tuitionFee: Public — regional fees (approx., set per comunidad)
programmes.careerOutcome: To practise as abogado/a: Máster de Acceso a la Abogacía + the state exam, then join a Colegio de Abogados

programmes.tuitionFee: Public — regional fees (approx., set per comunidad)
programmes.careerOutcome: Basis for psychology careers; clinical practice needs the PIR route or the Máster en Psicología General Sanitaria

programmes.programme: Grado en Maestro en Educación Primaria
programmes.tuitionFee: Public — regional fees (approx., set per comunidad)
programmes.careerOutcome: Qualifies to teach in primary schools; public-school posts via oposiciones

programmes.tuitionFee: Public — regional fees (approx., set per comunidad)
programmes.entryRequirements: Bachillerato (Ciencias) + EvAU/PAU; high nota de corte
programmes.careerOutcome: Registration as a dentist with a Colegio de Odontólogos; can practise on graduation

programmes.tuitionFee: Public — regional fees (approx., set per comunidad)
programmes.entryRequirements: Bachillerato + EvAU/PAU (sciences recommended); includes supervised clinical placements
programmes.careerOutcome: Registration as a nurse (enfermero/a) with the Colegio de Enfermería

programmes.tuitionFee: Public — regional fees (approx., set per comunidad)
programmes.entryRequirements: Bachillerato + EvAU/PAU (sciences recommended); includes clinical placements
programmes.careerOutcome: Registration as a physiotherapist (fisioterapeuta) with the Colegio de Fisioterapeutas

programmes.tuitionFee: Public — regional fees (approx., set per comunidad)
programmes.careerOutcome: Roles in software development and engineering; basis for a Máster if desired

programmes.programme: Grado en Fundamentos de la Arquitectura
programmes.englishName: Bachelor's Degree in Fundamentals of Architecture
programmes.tuitionFee: Public — regional fees (approx., set per comunidad)
programmes.careerOutcome: Followed by the Máster habilitante en Arquitectura to practise as a licensed architect

programmes.tuitionFee: Public — regional fees (approx., set per comunidad)
programmes.careerOutcome: Roles in software development and engineering; basis for a Màster if desired

programmes.programme: Técnico en Instalaciones Eléctricas y Automáticas (FP Grado Medio)
programmes.englishName: Vocational Diploma — Electrical & Automated Installations (FP, intermediate)
programmes.tuitionFee: Public (low/no fees at public FP centres)
programmes.entryRequirements: Access to FP Grado Medio (ESO or an access test); includes work placement (FCT)
programmes.careerOutcome: Qualifies as a Técnico to work as an electrician; can progress to FP Grado Superior

programmes.programme: Técnico en Instalaciones de Producción de Calor (FP Grado Medio)
programmes.englishName: Vocational Diploma — Heat Production Installations (FP, intermediate)
programmes.tuitionFee: Public (low/no fees at public FP centres)
programmes.entryRequirements: Access to FP Grado Medio (ESO or an access test); includes work placement (FCT)
programmes.careerOutcome: Qualifies as a Técnico for heating & plumbing installations; can progress to FP Grado Superior
